title: London: Pickett's Lock, V&A & British Museum

main_route.excerpt: The seven of us set off for London at 10.20. We arrived at Pickett's lock, [?sa] [?Vallba leisure] centre.
We are driving home up the motorway. ETA 7.50.

excursions.label: Saturday: Victoria & Albert Museum, Planetarium, Madame Tussauds Sims, Adelphi

stops.excerpt: We had lunch + bought day tickets + went to the Victoria + Albert Museum. We saw beautiful ivories + an Elizabethan portrait.
Thomas Planetarium + Sims; William, Planetarium + Sims; Peter Planetarium +
We tried to get tickets for Starlight Express at the Adelphi, but there weren't any.

excursions.label: Sunday: Westminster Abbey, Pizza Hut, Planetarium, Regents Park

stops.excerpt: Sunday We had a frustrating journey into London, + arrived in time for a sung [?Each] at Westminster Abbey, + glimpsed Peter Portal.
We lunched at Pizza Hut + went on to the Planetarium. The films made Eve feel sick.
We had Tea watching tennis in Regents Park.

excursions.label: Monday: Liberty's, Newman Arms, British Museum

stops.excerpt: We set off to Libertys & looked for material for Simon's dressing gown, bought Eve a rugby-watching brown coat.

stops.original_wording: Newman Arms, off Tottenham Court Rd.
stops.excerpt: We had a delicious lunch at the Newman Arms, off Tottenham Court Rd.; Eve had steak & [?fried] kidney pudding & spotted dick & custard.
We saw the Egyptian section & the peat bog man in the British Museum.

boundary_flags: A_0171_L has boundary_mixed=true: text before the Friday October 22nd heading belongs to a prior trip (Hartley Wintney, Farnham visit). The London trip begins at the heading 'Saturday Friday October 22nd'.
A_0172_L has boundary_mixed=true: entry ends mid-page; subsequent pages may begin another trip.
summary: A three-day family trip (Friday–Monday, 22–24 October 1995) to London, based at Pickett's Lock leisure centre in Edmonton. The seven family members visited the V&A, British Museum, London Planetarium, Westminster Abbey, Regent's Park, Liberty's and the Adelphi, and attended evening cinema screenings at the campsite.
extraction_notes: A_0171_L is boundary_mixed; the Hartley Wintney and Farnham passages before the 'Friday October 22nd' heading belong to a preceding trip and have been excluded. No international crossings — entirely domestic UK trip. The Planetarium appears on both Saturday and Sunday; modelled as separate excursion stops per day. 'Sims' alongside 'Planetarium' likely refers to Madame Tussauds Simulator rides adjacent to the Planetarium on Marylebone Road. Date start confirmed as 1995-10-22 (Friday October 22nd explicitly stated); date end 1995-10-24 (Monday October 24th explicitly stated).
